Meaning.En: To propel something through the air using the arm and hand.
Meaning.Example: She threw the baseball to first base.

Situation.Vi: Trong thể thao, vận động viên ném bóng.
Situation.En: In sports, an athlete hurls a ball toward a target.

Meaning.Vi: Đột ngột đặt, đặt vội, đưa ra (ý kiến, đề xuất)
Meaning.En: To suggest or propose something suddenly or casually.
Meaning.Example: He threw out an idea during the meeting.

Situation.Vi: Đưa ra ý tưởng trong brainstorming.
Situation.En: Offering a spontaneous idea during a brainstorming session.

Meaning.Vi: Ném vào (một tình huống, người), gây ra (hỗn loạn, bất ngờ)
Meaning.En: To cause something to happen suddenly or violently; to put someone in a particular state or situation.
Meaning.Example: The news threw her into despair.

Situation.Vi: Thông tin xấu khiến ai đó hoảng loạn.
Situation.En: Bad news suddenly plunges someone into shock or distress.

Meaning.Vi: Ném (xe, người) vào một tình huống nguy hiểm hoặc khó khăn
Meaning.En: To put someone or something in a difficult or dangerous situation.
Meaning.Example: The storm threw the ship off course.

Situation.Vi: Xe bị trượt khỏi đường do mưa lớn.
Situation.En: A vehicle veered off the road due to heavy rain.
